components.primary_button: bg-[#0F3822] text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center font-medium
components.secondary_button: border-2 border-[#0F3822] text-[#0F3822] rounded-xl py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center font-medium bg-transparent
components.bottom_nav: bg-white border-t border-gray-100 flex-row justify-around pb-6 pt-3 px-2 shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
components.chip_tag: bg-[#FDF8E7] text-[#B8860B] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold overflow-hidden

home.header: Rich dark green (#0F3822) header overlapping the content. Display the large 'السلام عليكم' greeting in gold/white and highlight 'Madrasa Tus Salikat Lil Banat'. Use 'home_header_bg' as image background.
home.featured_courses: Horizontal ScrollView with 2-3 featured course cards. Cards should peek from the right to indicate scrolling.
home.teachers_preview: A compact horizontal list or 2x2 grid of circular teacher avatars with names beneath.
home.announcements: A solid dark green banner card with a subtle gold lantern icon ('lantern_icon') and text.

courses.layout: Vertical ScrollView or FlatList displaying 14 courses.
courses.card_design: Image banner on top, course name in H3, teacher name with a small circular avatar, and a prominent 'Attend Class' full-width primary button.

teachers.card_design: Large rounded card. Top section contains the profile image ('teacher_avatar_1') and a golden 'Alima Fazila' title tag. Followed by name and short bio.

library.card_design: Vertical book card. Book cover image filling the top half, bold title, and muted category at the bottom.

about.layout: Clean, text-heavy layout wrapped in a ScrollView.
about.sections: Islamic Introduction starting with 'Bismillah'. Vision & Mission presented inside gold-accented cards (border-l-4 border-[#D4AF37]).

home_header_bg.description: Luxury dark green and gold abstract flowing silk background for the home screen top section.

teacher_avatar_1.description: Elegant abstract floral geometric avatar for female teachers (Alima Fazila).

teacher_avatar_2.description: Alternative elegant minimalist islamic arch silhouette avatar for teachers.

lantern_icon.description: Minimalist golden lantern with deep emerald background, good for announcements or icons.

course_placeholder_1.description: Ancient arabic calligraphy on parchment, used for Course/Library cards.

course_placeholder_2.description: Open ancient manuscript, used for Course/Library cards.

icons: Phosphor Icons or Lucide (React Native compatible). Focus on thin, elegant stroke weights to match the classic theme.
instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo app. Apply styles using NativeWind or standard React Native StyleSheet focusing on mobile-first responsive design.
Do not use transparent headers over images. Ensure contrast ratios for accessibility. The dark green (#0F3822) overlay should be fully opaque or slightly gradient.
Include 'testID' props on all interactive React Native components (buttons, tab items, cards) for automated testing. Example: testID='attend-class-button'.
The Home screen should have a distinct, visually rich upper section using the 'home_header_bg' image, overlapping with the Featured Courses horizontal list to create depth.
Primary CTAs must be solid green with rounded corners (rounded-xl) and clear text contrast.
For the 14 courses, use FlatList with the provided course placeholder images.
Do not use purely geometric rectangles. Soften everything with 'rounded-2xl'.
If custom fonts are not configured, fallback to standard elegant serifs (like Georgia/Times) for headings and system sans-serif for body. The Arabic greeting should use an Arabic/system font.
Ensure the bottom tab navigation is clean, with the active tab highlighted in gold (#D4AF37) or deep green (#0F3822).
